title: Stage 06e Performance Budget Gate
description: Stage 6e (Performance Budget) gate. Authored by the QA role after measuring Lighthouse scores, bundle size delta, and/or k6 load-test throughput against configured budgets. FAIL when budget_exceeded is true. PASS when all measured metrics meet their budgets, or when the change has no performance-relevant surface (skipped_reason set).

checks_performed.description: Which performance checks ran in this invocation. Subset of ["lighthouse", "bundle", "load-test"]. Empty only when skipped_reason is set.

lighthouse.description: Lighthouse performance audit results. Populated when 'lighthouse' is in checks_performed. Null otherwise.

score.description: Overall Lighthouse performance score (0–1). Budget default: 0.8 (≥ 80).

lcp_ms.description: Largest Contentful Paint in ms. Budget default: ≤ 2500ms (Good), ≤ 4000ms (Needs Improvement).

inp_ms.description: Interaction to Next Paint in ms (replaces FID). Budget default: ≤ 200ms (Good).

cls.description: Cumulative Layout Shift score (unitless). Budget default: ≤ 0.1 (Good).

fcp_ms.description: First Contentful Paint in ms. Budget default: ≤ 1800ms.

ttfb_ms.description: Time to First Byte in ms. Budget default: ≤ 800ms.

budget_score.description: The minimum acceptable Lighthouse score (0–1). Configured in performance.budget.json or .devteam/config.yml. Null = default (0.8).

tool.description: How Lighthouse was invoked: lighthouse-ci, @lhci/cli, lighthouse CLI, etc.

bundle.description: Bundle size analysis results. Populated when 'bundle' is in checks_performed. Null otherwise.

total_size_kb.description: Total JS/CSS bundle size after build, in KB.

delta_kb.description: Change in bundle size vs. baseline branch (positive = larger). Negative = improvement.

budget_kb.description: Maximum allowed total bundle size in KB. Configured in performance.budget.json. Null = unconstrained (warn only).

delta_budget_kb.description: Maximum allowed delta per PR in KB. Configured in performance.budget.json. Null = unconstrained.

budget_exceeded.description: True if total_size_kb > budget_kb OR delta_kb > delta_budget_kb.

tool.description: How bundle size was measured: bundlesize, size-limit, esbuild --analyze, webpack-bundle-analyzer, etc.

load_test.description: Load test results. Populated when 'load-test' is in checks_performed. Null otherwise.

tool.description: Load testing tool: k6, autocannon, wrk, locust, artillery, etc.

p95_ms.description: 95th percentile response time in ms. Primary latency SLO.

rps.description: Actual requests per second achieved during the test.

error_rate.description: Fraction of requests that errored (0–1). Budget default: ≤ 0.01 (1%).

budget_p95_ms.description: Maximum acceptable p95 latency in ms. Configured in performance.budget.json.

budget_rps.description: Minimum required RPS the service must sustain. Configured in performance.budget.json.

budget_exceeded.description: True if p95_ms > budget_p95_ms OR rps < budget_rps OR error_rate > budget_error_rate.
Top-level summary: true if ANY check (lighthouse, bundle, load-test) exceeded its budget. Any true here → stage FAIL.

skipped_reason.description: When set, all checks were skipped (e.g. 'backend-only change, no HTTP surface exposed', 'static doc changes only'). Status should be PASS, checks_performed [], budget_exceeded false. Captured for audit trail.
